title: Dreamscene Throw Blanket, Hearts Fluffy Throw Blankets for Bed Sofa Fleece Blanket Soft Thick Warm Blanket Picnic Travel Car Christmas Throw Blankets, Multi 120x150cm
features: Throw Blanket Sofa: Heavy blanket perfect for when the temperature drops during the autumn/winter months. Soft blanket that’s comfy and stylish.

Size: 120cm x 150cm: Large blanket for bed or for using as a throw blanket over sofas. Fleece blanket perfect as a decorative throw in living room, bedroom, outdoors, on picnics or as a travel blanket.
Colour: Red throw blanket with pink love hearts. Fleece throw that can be used as a car blanket, baby blanket, dog blanket, or Christmas throw blanket.
Thick blanket made from soft and comfy 100% microfibre fleece polyester. Easy care blanket throw machine washable at 30 degrees for long-lasting softness and comfort.
Ideal blanket gift for Christmas, Valentines Day, Mother's Day or Father's Day. Gift yourself or a loved one a comfy warm throw blanket for sofa, bed, pet, travelling, camping or evenings outside.
description: From the manufacturer About us Contemporary, trend led prints mixed with vibrant classical designs. Dreamscene is know for its large variety of colourful prints , which will brighten up your home. Modern on trend printed designs, mixed with traditional classics in bright colours. Dreamscene is known for its reliable quality and vibrant colours.
